data.body:
TARGETS — VERIFICATION CORRECTIONS (Explore audit, empirical). MATERIAL:
* BUG1 (validate arg) and BUG2 (ready) are ALREADY FIXED by the native-reads/DSO migration. Empirically: rebar.validate() works id-less + returns 6-key report; rebar.ready() returns a list; CLI `ready --json` + `validate --json` both work; MCP ready_tickets/validate return data. => This story's "2 prerequisite bug fixes" are MOOT — scope them as VERIFY-ONLY (add regression tests under T1; no code fix needed). Net story scope shrinks to schemas + typed MCP returns.
* The show-vs-list reducer DIVERGENCE flagged in the older validation comment is RESOLVED: native reads unified the reducer, so show/list/search emit byte-identical TicketState. No `parent_status_uuid` in output; do NOT add it to the schema. ticket_state.schema.json needs NO extension for list/search.
* ValidateReport: library does NOT currently add exit_code (older note said it did) — engine --json + library both return the 6-key shape. Schema = 6 keys; no exit_code.
* MCP typed-return reality CONFIRMED: only show_ticket is typed; these 14 return bare dict/list/object and need models: list_tickets, search, ticket_deps, ready_tickets, next_batch, clarity_check, check_ac, quality_check, validate, get_file_impact, get_verify_commands, transition_ticket, claim_ticket, reopen_ticket, create_ticket (bare str -> CreateResultOut, Mismatch C).
* Registry pattern confirmed: schemas/__init__.py load()/path()/NAME consts; replicate test_schema_ticket_state.py per schema.
